exception.message: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [There was a problem with your login and/or errors exist in your form.] but found [Invalid username or password. Please try again.]

exception.message: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [You have used 4 out of 5 login attempts. After all 5 have been used, you will be unable to login for 15 minutes.] but found [Invalid username or password. Please try again.]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Error message is not displayed as expected expected [You have used 4 out of 5 login attempts. After all 5 have been used, you will be unable to login for 15 minutes.] but found [Invalid username or password. exception.message: Message should be displayed as expected expected [Thank you for registering your account] but found [Please fill the form below to create a new account or login if you already have one. If you already created an account but haven't confirmed it yet, go here and enter the confirmation code which can be found in your email. Please make sure your PID/Passport Number is correct. It can't be changed.]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Message should be displayed as expected expected [Thank you for registering your account] but found [Please fill the form below to create a new account or login if you already have one. If you already created an account but haven't confirmed it yet, go here and enter the confirmation code which can be found in your email. Please make sure your PID/Passport Number is correct. It can't be changed.] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:150) at
